nasb.text: “Behold, the days are coming,” declares the Lord, “When I will raise up for David a righteous Branch; And He will reign as king and act wisely And do justice and righteousness in the land.

esv.text: “Behold, the days are coming, declares the Lord, when I will raise up for David a righteous Branch, and he shall reign as king and deal wisely, and shall execute justice and righteousness in the land.

cnv.text: “看哪！日子快到 ， 我必給大衛興起一個公義的苗裔； 他必執政為王，行事有智慧， 在地上施行公正和公義。

ccb.text: 耶和华说：“看啊，时候将到，我要为大卫选立一个公义的苗裔，使他执掌王权。他必秉公行义，治国有方。
